description.para: The following constants provide access to each of the registers of the System Monitor/ADC device.

briefdescription.para: Seq Reg 04 Adc Input Mode Select.
Seq Reg 05 Adc Input Mode Select.

sectiondef.header: System Monitor/ADC Software Reset Register (SRR) mask(s)
System Monitor/ADC Alarm Output Register (AOR) mask(s)
System Monitor/ADC device Interrupt Status/Enable Registers

description.para: This register holds the interrupt status flags for the device.

This register is used to enable interrupt sources for the device. Writing a '1' to a bit in this register enables the corresponding Interrupt. Writing a '0' to a bit in this register disables the corresponding Interrupt
IPISR/IPIER registers have the same bit definitions and are only defined once.

sectiondef.header: Mask for all ADC converted data including Minimum/Maximum Measurements

briefdescription.para: Alarm 3 - VBRAM Enable 7 Series and Zynq.

sectiondef.header: Alarm masks for channels in Configuration registers 1 and 3

briefdescription.para: Alarm 3 - VBRAM Enable 7 Series and Zynq.

sectiondef.header: OT Upper Alarm Threshold Register Bit Definitions

briefdescription.para: Read a register of the System Monitor/ADC device.

detaileddescription.para: This macro provides register access to all registers using the register offsets defined above.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
is the offset of the register to read.

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: u32 XSysMon_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset);

briefdescription.para: Write a register of the System Monitor/ADC device.

detaileddescription.para: This macro provides register access to all registers using the register offsets defined above.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
is the offset of the register to write.
is the value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: void XSysMon_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset,u32 Data)
